title: Dakkar the Distant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dakkar the Distant''' was the unpleasant owner of a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the edge of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] who employed dancing girls as young as fifteen, including [[Shaara]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Shaara and the Sarlacc: The Skiff Guard's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
